question: Are both Barry Unsworth and P. G. Wodehouse from the same country? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Barry Unsworth: Unsworth was born on 10 August 1930 in Wingate, a mining village in County Durham, England.
1.subquestion: What country is associated with Barry Unsworth?

2.fact: P. G. Wodehouse: Sir Pelham Grenville Wodehouse was an English author and one of the most widely read humorists of the 20th century.
2.subquestion: What country is associated with P. G. Wodehouse?

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Barry Unsworth was born in England, and P. G. Wodehouse is described as an English author, so they are from the same country. -> yes
